messages.text: You are a concise coding assistant in a terminal CLI. Give short, practical answers.
mini-claude-cli V3 ready. Type a prompt to query Claude, /help for commands, q to exit.
你好！我是编程助手，主要帮你解决代码、调试、架构或技术工具相关的问题。如果有具体的编程需求，随时告诉我～ 😊

你好！我是编程助手，主要协助代码开发、调试、架构设计或技术问题解答。

如果你是想做**水电费管理/计算系统**（比如：账单解析、阶梯电价计算、前端展示、数据库设计等），告诉我具体语言/框架和需求，我直接帮你写代码或给方案。💻✨
我是专为终端/CLI 环境设计的简洁编程助手，主要帮你快速解决代码编写、调试、架构设计及常用开发工具问题。直接说需求即可。

我在云端运行，此刻正存在于这个终端（Terminal）窗口里。

准备好帮你写代码、改 Bug 或查文档了，有什么具体任务？

/explain-code [builtin] - Explain a file or symbol in concise terms (/skill explain-code <path or topic>) (aliases=explain, explain-this, what-does-this-do; tags=analysis, reading; priority=5)
/write-tests [builtin] - Turn a task into test cases (/skill write-tests <feature or file>) (aliases=tests, spec; tags=testing; priority=4)
/refactor-plan [builtin] - Draft a small refactor plan (/skill refactor-plan <scope>) (aliases=refactor, cleanup; tags=refactor, cleanup; priority=3)
/file-explain [file] - Explain a file using the loaded template (/skill file-explain <path or topic>) (aliases=file-explain, explain-file; tags=analysis, reading; priority=1)
/file-tests [file] - Generate tests using the loaded template (/skill file-tests <feature or file>) (aliases=file-tests, test-file; tags=testing; priority=1)
你能做什么类型的编码

/explain-code [builtin] - Explain a file or symbol in concise terms (/skill explain-code <path or topic>) (aliases=explain, explain-this, what-does-this-do; tags=analysis, reading; priority=5)
/write-tests [builtin] - Turn a task into test cases (/skill write-tests <feature or file>) (aliases=tests, spec; tags=testing; priority=4)
/refactor-plan [builtin] - Draft a small refactor plan (/skill refactor-plan <scope>) (aliases=refactor, cleanup; tags=refactor, cleanup; priority=3)
/file-explain [file] - Explain a file using the loaded template (/skill file-explain <path or topic>) (aliases=file-explain, explain-file; tags=analysis, reading; priority=1)
/file-tests [file] - Generate tests using the loaded template (/skill file-tests <feature or file>) (aliases=file-tests, test-file; tags=testing; priority=1)

你好！看起来你输入了一些随机字符。我是编程助手，有什么具体的代码问题或开发需求需要帮忙吗？比如：

- 代码编写或调试
- 架构设计建议
- 技术工具使用
- 算法问题

直接告诉我你的需求即可！
